Andreessen Horowitz and Sequoia Capital led the round and both took board seats. Its co-founder Ben Horowitz is joining the board. Deployment of the first gigawatt begins in the first half of 2027. Anthropic is already using […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Reddit may cut Google off from its content, and it isn’t the only one https://thenextweb.com/news/reddit-google-ai-content-deal-publishers-traffic Thu, 23 Jul 2026 17:04:21 +0000 TheNextWeb=fe6ae1cc06ac4fc8d76d286cbd575516 For twenty years, the deal between Google and the web was simple. Publishers let Google crawl their pages. Google sent readers back in return. That bargain is breaking. Reddit is the latest, and loudest, sign. Its shares fell about 9% on Wednesday after the Wall Street Journal reported that the company has discussed cutting off […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Xbox is testing ad-supported game streaming. Amazon is folding Luna into Prime Video. Amazon is […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Nvidia rival Etched doubles its value to $10.3B in seven months https://thenextweb.com/news/etched-300m-series-c-10-3b-valuation-sequoia-sk-hynix Thu, 23 Jul 2026 16:37:19 +0000 TheNextWeb=1b161d5b12a7fd4b9d85989b189ee6db Etched has a simple pitch. Nvidia builds chips that do everything. Etched builds chips that do one thing, inference, and claims to do it far better. On Thursday the bet got a lot more money behind it. The startup raised $300 million in a Series C round that values it at $10.3 billion. Sequoia led […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Drone makers race to build navigation that survives warzone jamming https://thenextweb.com/news/drone-navigation-gps-jamming-quantum-farnborough Thu, 23 Jul 2026 16:35:54 +0000 TheNextWeb=4ee9d36dd00432470f1f693d6d3c8caa GPS spoofing and jamming have become standard countermeasures on the battlefield in Ukraine, separating drones from their operators and rendering some guided munitions useless. US-made Excalibur artillery shells fell out of favour after initial successes because their GPS guidance was jammable. Even fibre-optic control wires have been countered by entangling lines strung across fields. The […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Apple’s privacy policy reveals an AI shopping assistant is coming to the Apple Store app https://thenextweb.com/news/apple-store-app-ai-shopping-assistant-privacy-policy Thu, 23 Jul 2026 16:05:18 +0000 TheNextWeb=cf1759c4f2a8f2db557d60e88cebc7bf Apple is preparing to add an AI-powered shopping assistant to the Apple Store app, according to a privacy policy update spotted by MacRumors. The updated document describes a “Virtual Shopping Assistant” that collects account information, device identifiers, carrier information, chat data, and optionally location data to personalise responses. The feature is not live yet. Apple […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Cambridge built a planet-scale AI model, and skipped Nvidia to do it https://thenextweb.com/news/tessera-cambridge-earth-observation-ai-amd-vultr Thu, 23 Jul 2026 16:04:46 +0000 TheNextWeb=f40680fe78838acdc5e7b16e7593c6d0 The AI industry runs on Nvidia. A team at the University of Cambridge has just shown it does not have to. They have built a planetary-scale foundation model for the Earth, and every chip that trained and ran it came from AMD.
